## Provider Being Added Or Updated

<!-- Example: Goldsky -->

## I Am

- [ ] An official representative of this provider
- [ ] A user of this provider
- [ ] Other:

## Source Attestation

<!-- Link to the official source of this information: provider docs, blog post, pricing page, or official social post. -->

## ChainLens Paid API Listing

<!-- GitHub directory inclusion does not activate a paid API listing. If you want this provider to become executable on ChainLens, check the relevant boxes and include the optional `chainlens` block. -->

- [ ] This provider wants to be listed as an executable paid API on ChainLens
- [ ] I included a `chainlens` block with contact and preferred task types
- [ ] I understand endpoint, price, output schema, payout address, and wallet claim happen in the ChainLens frontend

## Checklist

- [ ] JSON file is under `providers/` and named after its `slug`
- [ ] JSON file passes `npm run validate` locally
- [ ] `last_verified` is set to today's date
- [ ] `description` is factual and does not use marketing language
- [ ] `source_attestation` links to an official provider source
